backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Icon, Connection, FreehandDrawing, Line, TextLabel, Image, DiagramState) and CRUD operations for diagrams and user profiles, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—white canvas background and removal of icon text labels—to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build-planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Threat Hunting Portal' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/index.ts: Utility snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage to capture a canvas element and export it as a PNG data URL.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for report list, create, detail, and attack-path pages, and gates rendering behind Internet Identity authentication with a profile-setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive SVG/div canvas component for the attack path diagram supporting drag-and-drop icons, freehand drawing, lines, arrows, text labels, images, connections, eraser, selection, and free-transform resize/rotate via complex drag-state management.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG component rendering a directed arrow connector between two points with optional rotation, selection highlighting, and a wider invisible hit area for easier clicking.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Defines an `AttackPathIcon` component that renders a named security/network icon from a static image map, with optional label and drag support for toolbar use.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Renders a sidebar toolbar for the attack path diagram editor, providing draggable icon types, drawing tools (pen, line, arrow, text), color/stroke controls, and actions like undo, save, clear, and image upload.
frontend/src/components/DiagramSidebar.t: Displays a scrollable list of saved diagrams with metadata (icon count, connections, last modified date) and supports loading or deleting diagrams via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the top-level page layout with a sticky header/nav (Reports, Attack Path, New Report links, user profile, login button), an optional hero banner on the home page, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: A modal dialog that lists all saved diagrams with their metadata and allows the user to load a selected diagram or delete one with a confirmation prompt.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, clearing the identity and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen that prompts unauthenticated users to authenticate via Internet Identity, showing a loading state during the login process.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A React component providing a searchable popover to select MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list and add custom technique entries, managing both sets via parent-provided callbacks.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a given report using `generateReportPdf`, showing a loading spinner and toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and blocking dismissal until saved.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports, collecting fields like title, author, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and remediation details before passing validated data to an `onSubmit` callback.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts the user to enter a name for saving an attack path diagram, calling an `onSave` callback with the trimmed name on confirmation.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Exports a static array of MITRE ATT&CK technique objects (id, name, description) covering categories such as Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A React hook managing the full state of an attack path canvas—icons, connections, drawings, text labels, images, and selection—with undo history support via a 50-entry history stack.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the actor and invalidates the 'allDiagrams' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend, with custom loading/fetched state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram by its bigint ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get all, get one, save, delete), but all backend calls are stubbed out as the report functionality has been removed from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the actor and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state via the actor and invalidates related diagram query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Page component that composes the attack path diagram editor with a canvas, toolbar, sidebar for saved diagrams, and save/load functionality backed by the diagram state hooks.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a report creation form and submits it via the useSaveReport mutation, navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a detailed view of a single threat hunt report including sections for summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, and a PDF download button.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React page that displays a table of all threat hunting reports with options to view, download as PDF, and delete each report, using TanStack Router for navigation and React Query hooks for data fetching.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility that generates a styled printable HTML document from a DetailedReport object and opens it in a new browser window for PDF export.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography, border radius, font families, box shadows, and accordion animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React app with path aliasing, environment variable injection for canister/DFX prefixes, a dev proxy to the local ICP replica, and a single output chunk build.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the Threat Hunting Portal's existing features (white canvas background and label-free canvas icons) and configuration for the build planner.
